name: Peerless Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees. Grease a 9-inch round, 1 1/2-inch deep cake pan.
With a fork, stir together the cake flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt and sugar in a bowl.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg, melted butter, oil and milk until well blended.
Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture and stir until fully incorporated. The batter will be somewhat thin and light.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 15 minutes, or until a straw inserted in the center comes out with a few moist crumbs.
Press the center of the bread; if it feels slightly firm, the bread is done. Be careful not to overbake.
Serve warm wedges of the cornbread with butter and honey.
Yield: 1 9-inch round loaf
